goal: Rewrite and strengthen docs/community/COMMUNITY_MODULE_SPEC.md into an implementation-facing specification that aligns with the current repository architecture, clarifies scope and phases, and turns the existing broad proposal into a grounded community feature plan.
constraints: Keep the document aligned with the repository's current main flow and component structure.
Do not implement runtime code in this task; this task is documentation refinement only.
Prefer MVP decisions that fit the current MainMenu/App integration pattern instead of inventing a disconnected new flow.
Clarify scope, non-goals, data model, persistence, moderation, and phased rollout so future implementation can proceed with less ambiguity.
deliverables: An updated COMMUNITY_MODULE_SPEC document with clearer architecture alignment, user flows, module boundaries, data contracts, and phased implementation plan.
If a durable architectural choice is made by the document rewrite, record it in repository knowledge.
